regulation_name: Monopoly Regulation and Fair Trade Act
citation: Monopoly Regulation and Fair Trade Act — Article 23
summary: Comparative advertising must be objective, substantiated, and must not unfairly disparage competitors.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Versus competitor, market leader, or superiority claims. ACTION: WARN — require substantiation on file. CHECK: Identifiable competitor, evidence date, and methodology. ESCALATE IF: False or unfair comparative claim.
